runs.text: Supplier Layer | The opportunity sits between Navy budget authority and prime-yard construction, in component work yards buy out rather than self-perform.

text_body.plain_text: Supplier Layer | The opportunity sits between Navy budget authority and prime-yard construction, in component work yards buy out rather than self-perform.

runs.text: Supplier-addressable component work sits inside Navy new-construction funding, not total ship cost.

runs.text: Blue = counted supplier layer; gray = excluded or context only; outline = prime or team-build layer.

text_body.plain_text: Blue = counted supplier layer; gray = excluded or context only; outline = prime or team-build layer.

runs.text: The primes differ, but the serviceable cut is the same.

DDG dollars run through Bath Iron Works and Ingalls; submarine dollars run through Electric Boat and Newport News. In both lanes, the counted layer is supplier component work outside GFE, sustainment, and yard self-perform.
Visible subawards prove the layer, not its full size.
FFATA-visible filings provide supplier names and work-type cues; first-tier visibility thins below the first tier and differs by yard.

text_body.plain_text:
The primes differ, but the serviceable cut is the same.
DDG dollars run through Bath Iron Works and Ingalls; submarine dollars run through Electric Boat and Newport News. In both lanes, the counted layer is supplier component work outside GFE, sustainment, and yard self-perform.
Visible subawards prove the layer, not its full size.
FFATA-visible filings provide supplier names and work-type cues; first-tier visibility thins below the first tier and differs by yard.

runs.text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN shipbuilding budget justification and line-item structure, FY2022–FY2027; (2) prime-yard place-of-performance award corpus; (3) FFATA/FSRS first-tier subaward records

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN shipbuilding budget justification and line-item structure, FY2022–FY2027; (2) prime-yard place-of-performance award corpus; (3) FFATA/FSRS first-tier subaward records
